formName: Step 3 - Dam Safety - Contact Organization - Water Licence Application
formDescription: This section is used to identify an organization (such as a consulting firm or engineering company) involved in the design, supervision, construction, or maintenance of the dam or reservoir. It collects legal identity, registration numbers, and comprehensive contact details.

LegalName.title: Legal Name:
LegalName.description: The official registered name of the organization.

DoingBusinessAs.title: Doing Business As:
DoingBusinessAs.description: The trade name or operating name used by the organization, if different from the legal name.

PhoneNumber.title: Phone Number:
PhoneNumber.description: Primary business phone number for the organization.

PhoneExtension.title: Ext:
PhoneExtension.description: Telephone extension for the organization's primary contact line.

FaxNumber.title: Fax Number:
FaxNumber.description: The organization's facsimile number for document transmission.

Email.title: Email:
Email.description: General or contact email address for the organization.

BCIncNo.title: BC Incorporation Number:
BCIncNo.description: The incorporation number assigned to the company in British Columbia.

BusinessRegistrationNumber.title: Extra Provincial Inc. No:
BusinessRegistrationNumber.description: The registration number for a corporation formed outside of BC but registered to do business within the province.

SocietyNo.title: Society Number:
SocietyNo.description: The registration number assigned if the organization is a registered society.

GSTRegistrationNo.title: GST Registration No:
GSTRegistrationNo.description: The organization's Goods and Services Tax registration number.

ContactName.title: Contact Name:
ContactName.description: The name of the specific individual within the organization who acts as the primary contact.
